name: eu.ansvar/iam-mcp
description: IAM expert intelligence: standards advisory (NIST 800-63/800-53, ISO 27001/2, Zero Trust), threat patterns (MITRE ATT&CK, CWE, CAPEC), protocol deep-dives (OAuth, OIDC, SAML, FIDO2), architecture patterns (RBAC, ABAC, PAM, federation), vendor configurations (Azure Entra, AWS, GCP, Okta, CyberArk), compliance cross-mapping, and emerging technology tracking (passkeys, decentralized identity)
